top_tweets.text: I'm honestly pumped for a software update that's mostly just combing through the fine details, performance improvements, etc. Liquid Glass and a lot of recent design elements have felt sloppy. The fact that "same corner radius in every Mac app" had to be an announced feature is
top_tweets.author: MKBHD
top_tweets.name: Marques Brownlee
top_tweets.summary_zh: MKBHD 期待蘋果軟體更新能專注於細節打磨與效能改善，指出 Liquid Glass 等近期設計元素顯得草率，連「統一所有 Mac app 的圓角半徑」都需要當作功能宣傳就很說明問題。

top_tweets.text:
Banks close at 4 pm. Appointments run from 9-5. Shops open from 9-5. I work 9-5 in an office. Everyone is only available when I'm not. I can't go to your shop, the bank, or book anything without taking time off work. 

Why did we design society like this ??

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
